title: Khaby Lame mechanism villager
description: rotates villager arms like the khaby lame mechanism meme
body:
required: **[optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

This pack rotates arms of the villager similar to the Khaby Lame mechanism meme, that's all

All trades lead to Khaby Lame mechanism villager

scary fact number 67: the rotation of the villagers hand is -67

"kevin well done" doesn't go hard guys💔💔✌️
